replacements.description: Players don't lose the game for drawing from an empty library.

statics.description: Players have no maximum hand size and don't lose the game for drawing from an empty library.
Each player can't cast more than one spell each turn.

triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, each player puts their library into their hand.
When CARDNAME leaves the battlefield, each player shuffles their hand and graveyard into their library.
